title: RecommendationType
content:
# RecommendationType


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Recommendation Type was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): The user or process that initiated the creation of this recommendation type.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` for the Recommendation Type.
- **title** (`string`): 
- **metadata** (`object`): Detailed Attributes of the Recommendation Type. The structure of the `metadata` object can have any key/value structure.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Recommendation Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated_by** (`string`): The user or process that updated this recommendation type.
summary: Object with properties: created, created_by, name, title, metadata

created.description: UTC time when the Recommendation Type was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: The user or process that initiated the creation of this recommendation type.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Recommendation Type.

metadata.description: Detailed Attributes of the Recommendation Type. The structure of the `metadata` object can have any key/value structure.

updated.description: UTC time when any Recommendation Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: The user or process that updated this recommendation type.
